title: MINECRAFT: Vanilla Vistas
description: A reimagining of Console Edition Minecraft, with added content catering to the revamping of the Overworld, Nether, and the End in a fantasy style.
body:
# MINECRAFT: Vanilla Vistas
![Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15a38ea485dba731f9ffde089e4b05a98d6addf1.png)

Here lies a modpack that attempts to breathe life back into the Console Edition variant of Minecraft. It's a simple modpack that is relatively lightweight, which attempts to make the Overworld a cozier place, and the Nether and End more varied in environments. Furthermore, through the help of the **Legacy4J** mod, you can expect a revamped UI and gameplay that takes inspiration from 4J Studio's own formula.

## What you can expect:
- Serene environments with both new well-integrated biomes and old.
- A refreshed weather system with localized fronts and storms.
- A focus on new ambience, both through VFX and sound design.
- New underground, Nether, and End biomes for exploration.
- New structures that fit well with Minecraft's fantasy asethetic.
- New creatures and mounts, such as dragons.
